command:
bash -c PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 uv run python -c "
import pymupdf
d = pymupdf.open(\"tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1162_neco.1997.9.6.1179/files/hines_1997_neuron-simulation-environment.pdf\")
full = \"\"
for i, p in enumerate(d):
    full += f\"\n=== PAGE {i+1} ===\n\" + p.get_text()
with open(\"C:/Users/md1avn/Documents/GitHub/neuron-channels-worktrees/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1162_neco.1997.9.6.1179/files/_fulltext.txt\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:
    f.write(full)
print(\"TOTAL_CHARS:\", len(full))
"
